heading: Staff of Board; experts and consultants
label: 179t Staff of Board; experts and consultants
notes: References in TextThe General Schedule, referred to in subsec. (b), is set out under , Government Organization and Employees.section 5332 of Title 5

children.heading: Staff
children.label: a Staff
children.text: The Librarian may appoint and fix the pay of such personnel as the Librarian considers appropriate to carry out sections 179 to 179w of this title.l

children.heading: Experts and consultants
children.label: b Experts and consultants
children.text: The Librarian may, in carrying out sections 179 to 179w of this title, procure temporary and intermittent services under , but at rates for individuals not to exceed the daily equivalent of the maximum rate of basic pay payable for GS–15 of the General Schedule. In no case may a member of the Board or an alternate be paid as an expert or consultant under this section.lsection 3109(b) of title 5
